subject: Fix: Replace nodejs-dev with libnode-dev on 20.04 Ubuntu Should fix IT-24453
commit_message:
Fix: Replace nodejs-dev with libnode-dev on 20.04 Ubuntu
Should fix IT-24453

Signed-off-by: Bengt Thuree <bthuree@linuxfoundation.org>
